name: GIGABYTE B550M K Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Realtek GbE LAN
shortName: GIGABYTE B550M K Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Micro-ATX motherboard with AM4 socket and B550 chipset for Ryzen mid-range systems with DDR4.
